Font Awesome Free 6.7.2
========================

Copyright (c) 2024 Fonticons, Inc. (https://fontawesome.com)

This project bundles and distributes Font Awesome Free. Font Awesome Free is
free, open source, and GPL friendly. Full license: https://fontawesome.com/license/free

---- License Components ----

Icons:   CC BY 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)
Fonts:   SIL OFL 1.1 (https://scripts.sil.org/OFL)
Code:    MIT (https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)

---- Attribution (required by CC BY 4.0, SIL OFL 1.1, and MIT) ----

The bundled files in static/fontawesome/ retain their embedded attribution
comments as distributed by Fonticons, Inc. No attribution metadata has been
removed from any Font Awesome file.

Attribution to the original work:
  Name:    Font Awesome Free
  Author:  Fonticons, Inc. (https://fontawesome.com)

All brand icons are trademarks of their respective owners. The use of these
trademarks does not indicate endorsement of the trademark holder by Font
Awesome, nor vice versa. Please do not use brand logos for any purpose except
to represent the company, product, or service to which they refer.
